nodes.label: AI as administrative and mathematical tool
nodes.grounding_span: I try not to use it for anything to do with my writing. I prefer to use it for admin and some more mathematical issues

nodes.label: AI as final check and confidence booster
nodes.label_negative: AI as editor or writer of creative content
nodes.grounding_span: At most, I'll use it for a final check before publication, or if I'm feeling bad about my writing, I might use it for a confidence boost

nodes.label: AI feedback as useful but fallible
nodes.label_negative: AI feedback as authoritative and always correct
nodes.grounding_span: I take everything with a pinch of salt. Sometimes, it will tell me I've made mistakes which aren't really mistakes

nodes.label: Human writing as deeply human and nuanced
nodes.label_negative: AI writing as technically perfect but lacking depth
nodes.grounding_span: being a good writer is all about understanding humanity, which LLMs are simply incapable of doing

nodes.label: AI-assisted writing as acceptable for technical purposes
nodes.label_negative: AI-assisted writing as threat to creative writing
nodes.grounding_span: I think AI-assisted writing is ok. I think we have to get with the times and be realistic about its place in our world

nodes.label: AI as remixer of existing ideas
nodes.label_negative: AI as generator of novel ideas
nodes.grounding_span: Right now, AI is only capable of remixing what's already out there

nodes.label: Personal creative integrity and authenticity
nodes.grounding_span: my core desire is to be a good writer

nodes.label: Human understanding and depth in writing
nodes.grounding_span: being a good writer is all about understanding humanity

nodes.label: Enjoyment and personal fulfillment in writing
nodes.grounding_span: I love writing so much. It would be no fun if a computer got to do it all

nodes.label: Strong resistance to AI in creative writing
nodes.grounding_span: I try not to use it for anything to do with my writing

nodes.label: Cautious acceptance of AI for administrative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to use it for admin and some more mathematical issues

nodes.label: Skeptical discernment of AI feedback
nodes.grounding_span: I take everything with a pinch of salt

nodes.label: Optimism about human writing gaining prestige
nodes.grounding_span: human writing will have more prestige

nodes.label: Boundary-setting and domain separation
nodes.grounding_span: I try not to use it for anything to do with my writing. I prefer to use it for admin

nodes.label: Critical evaluation and selective acceptance of AI output
nodes.grounding_span: I take everything with a pinch of salt
